prose:
Frontier-orbitals single-point calculation on O₂ (triplet ground state, multiplicity = 3, charge = 0) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard'), in the gas phase, via PySCF (UKS, spin-unrestricted). No solvent. Geometry taken as-is from the supplied .xyz file (no re-optimization). SCF converged cleanly in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity: trustworthy = true.

Key results:
  HOMO energy:       −8.8739616 eV  (degenerate with HOMO−1; corresponds to singly-occupied π* of O₂ triplet)
  LUMO energy:       −3.5859031 eV  (degenerate with LUMO+1)
  HOMO–LUMO gap:      5.2880586 eV  [headline value]
  Total energy:    −150.38872 Hartree (−4092.2855 eV)

Koopmans descriptors (all from UKS B3LYP/def2-TZVP, gas phase):
  Vertical IP:       8.8740 eV
  Vertical EA:       3.5859 eV
  Electronegativity: 6.2299 eV
  Chemical hardness: 2.6440 eV
  Softness:          0.3782 eV⁻¹
  Electrophilicity:  7.3396 eV

Method: UKS B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard), PySCF with RI density fitting. Gas phase. Charge 0, multiplicity 3.
